metadata.description: Furl context compression for Claude Code — MCP server + fail-open compression hook + how-it-works skill.

plugins.name: furl
plugins.description: Furl context compression: the Furl MCP server (furl_compress / furl_retrieve / furl_stats / furl_purge / furl_search / furl_list) plus a fail-open PostToolUse hook that shrinks large tool outputs before they enter context. Originals stay byte-exactly retrievable via <<ccr:HASH>> markers.
